_comment: Global WhatsApp outreach templates. The AI selects a template by step + lead industry and fills {{variables}}. For the 360dialog API, template NAMES must also be pre-approved in your WhatsApp Business account; the body here is the approved copy.

templates.name: cold_intro
templates.body: Hi {{first_name}}, I help {{industry}} companies like {{company}} grow with performance marketing. Saw what you're building — would a quick idea be useful?

templates.name: followup_1
templates.body: Hi {{first_name}}, following up on my last note. One quick win for {{company}}: {{value_point}}. Worth a short chat?

templates.name: followup_2
templates.body: Hi {{first_name}}, we helped a similar {{industry}} company {{case_study_result}}. Happy to share how — interested?

templates.name: booking_request
templates.body: Hi {{first_name}}, would love 15 minutes to walk through ideas for {{company}}. Grab a slot here: {{calendly_link}}

templates.name: breakup_message
templates.body: Hi {{first_name}}, I don't want to crowd your inbox — I'll close the loop here. If growth at {{company}} becomes a priority, just reply and I'm around. All the best!
